creator: keith@keithf4.com
text:
The January 1, 2018 release of weechat 2.0.1 fails to build either via portmaster or a direct build in the ports directory. The previous release of 2.0.1 was working fine and I also downloaded the source from the software's main website to test building manually and that works fine too. Both the portmaster and direct port build fail with the same errors below.
